prompt: Something in our geocoder wrapper is haunted. The nightly batch fires a health probe with a one-off 500ms timeout and zero retries, and from that moment every subsequent lookup in the process times out at 500ms and never retries. Separately, ops noticed the anonymous search client has started sending the billing client's x-api-key header — those are two different GeoClient instances that should know nothing about each other. It even bleeds across constructors: make one client with custom options and a brand-new client built afterwards comes up with those options instead of the documented defaults. I wrote test_client.ts to pin all of this down and it fails all over the place. Fix client.ts so options land where they're supposed to and nowhere else. Don't edit the tests.
